section.heading: Assistant Administrators of Environmental Protection Agency; appointment; duties

subsection.chapeau: The President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, may appoint three Assistant Administrators of the Environmental Protection Agency in addition to—

paragraph.content: the five Assistant Administrators provided for in section 1(d) of Reorganization Plan Numbered 3 of 1970 (5 U.S.C. Appendix);
the Assistant Administrator provided by section 2625(g) of title 15; and
the Assistant Administrator provided by section 6911a of this title.

subsection.content: Each Assistant Administrator appointed under subsection (a) shall perform such duties as the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency may prescribe.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Reorganization Plan Numbered 3 of 1970, referred to in subsec. (a)(1), is set out under section 4321 of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was not enacted as part of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 which comprises this chapter.
